overview: Admission Host is a high-converting education consultancy website designed to generate student leads. Features a hero section, trust stats, course cards, services, testimonials, and a registration CTA linked to a Google Form.
features: Hero section with Apply Now CTA
Trust stats: 500+ Students, 50+ Colleges, 9+ Years Experience
Course cards: Medical, Engineering, Pharmacy, Nursing, Management
Registration CTA linked to Google Form
